name: Clarity
description: VMware's enterprise Angular design system with 40+ components, design tokens, and accessibility-focused architecture

description.value: VMware's enterprise Angular design system with 40+ components, design tokens, and accessibility-focused architecture

license.comment: MIT license for design system; Open Font License (OFL) for fonts

active-maintenance.comment: Active development; v17.12.1 released December 9, 2025; maintained by VMware/Broadcom

initial-release.comment: Open sourced November 15, 2016; Clarity 1.0 announced December 2018; ng-clarity repo created March 2022 as split from monorepo

github-stars.comment: 399 stars on ng-clarity repo as of December 2025; original clarity repo (archived) had 6.5k+ stars

framework.comment: Built specifically for Angular; maintains version parity with Angular (currently v17.x)

styling-approach.comment: Uses SCSS with CSS custom properties for design tokens; @clr/ui provides static styles

component-model.comment: Fully styled components with Clarity Design System visual identity; no headless mode

typescript.comment: 69.3% TypeScript codebase; full type definitions included

ssr-compatible.comment: Compatible with Angular SSR (Angular Universal); standard Angular library practices apply

rsc-compatible.comment: N/A - React Server Components is a React-specific feature; not applicable to Angular

design-system.comment: VMware's proprietary Clarity Design System; used by 100+ VMware products including vSphere, vCloud Director, AirWatch

dark-mode.comment: Built-in accessible Dark UI Theme alongside Light UI Theme; both WCAG compliant

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via design tokens; semantic color aliases, spacing tokens, layout-space system for component and layout control

css-variables.comment: Design tokens fully integrated as CSS custom properties; mandatory in v17+; enables theme switching and customization

design-tokens.comment: Full design token system with semantic color aliases, spacing tokens, and component tokens; tokens align CSS architecture with VMware brand experience

rtl-support.comment: RTL not built-in; open GitHub issue (#1176) requesting RTL CSS support; marked as low-priority enhancement awaiting external contribution

component-count.comment: 40+ components: Accordion, Alert, Badge, Breadcrumbs, Button, Button Group, Card, Checkbox, Combobox, Datagrid, Datalist, Date Picker, Date Range Picker, Dropdown, File Picker, Header, Input, Label, List, Login Page, Modal, Password, Progress Bar, Radio, Range Input, Select, Side Panel, Signpost, Spinner, Stack View, Stepper, Table, Tabs, Textarea, Toggle, Tooltip, Timeline, Tree View, Vertical Nav, Wizard

text-input.comment: clrInput directive with form control integration; password, email, search variants; validation states

textarea.comment: clrTextarea directive with form control integration; validation states

select.comment: clrSelect for single-select dropdowns with form integration

multi-select.comment: No built-in multi-select component; single-select only

combobox.comment: clr-combobox with typeahead filtering, single/multi selection modes

checkbox.comment: clr-checkbox with form integration; indeterminate state; checkbox groups

radio.comment: clr-radio with form integration; radio groups with validation

switch-toggle.comment: clr-toggle for toggle switches with form integration

slider.comment: Range Input component for slider functionality

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input with increment/decrement; use standard input with type='number'

date-picker.comment: clr-date-container with date picker; calendar-based date selection

date-range-picker.comment: Date Range Picker component for selecting start and end dates

file-upload.comment: File Picker component for file input functionality

dropzone.comment: File Picker is click-based; no drag-and-drop dropzone component

input-groups.comment: No dedicated input group component for combining inputs with addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown component

button-groups.comment: Button Group component for grouped/segmented buttons

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button component; can be built with button group and dropdown

table.comment: Basic Table component for data display

data-table.comment: Powerful Datagrid with 21 demo variations; sorting, filtering, pagination, virtual scrolling, selection, expandable rows, server-driven data, custom filters including numeric range filtering

virtual-infinite-list.comment: Datagrid supports virtual scrolling for large datasets

tree-view.comment: Tree View for hierarchical expandable tree structures

list-view.comment: List component for styled list display

tag-chip-pill.comment: Label component for tags/labels with colors

timeline.comment: Timeline component for vertical timeline of events

calendar.comment: Date picker has calendar UI but no standalone calendar display component

alert.comment: Alert component for static alert/banner messages with multiple types

toast-notification.comment: No toast/notification component; use Alert for inline messages

progress-bar.comment: Progress Bar component for determinate progress indication

progress-circle.comment: No circular progress component; Spinner is indeterminate only

spinner-loader.comment: Spinner component for indeterminate loading indicators; multiple sizes

modal-dialog.comment: Modal component with header, content, footer structure; clr-modal with multiple sizes

drawer-sheet.comment: Side Panel component for slide-in panels from edges

popover.comment: Signpost component for floating content anchored to triggers

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown component for action menus on click

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

vertical-tabs.comment: No vertical tabs; use Vertical Nav for side navigation patterns

breadcrumb.comment: Breadcrumbs component for hierarchical path navigation

pagination.comment: Pagination built into Datagrid; also available as pattern

stepper.comment: Stepper component for multi-step process indicator and navigation

navigation-menu.comment: Header component for site navigation with dropdowns

sidebar.comment: Vertical Nav for collapsible sidebar navigation

bottom-navigation.comment: No bottom navigation component; enterprise-focused, desktop-first design

grid.comment: Grid system available via @clr/ui CSS classes

stack.comment: No dedicated Stack component; use CSS utilities

container.comment: No dedicated Container component; layout via CSS utilities

collapsible.comment: Accordion component for expandable/collapsible content sections

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: No built-in chart components; commonly paired with third-party charting libraries

form-libraries.comment: Native integration with Angular Reactive Forms and Template-driven Forms; ClrInput directive manages form control automatically

animation-libraries.comment: Uses Angular's built-in animation system for component transitions

icon-libraries.comment: Clarity Icons library with extensive icon set; @cds/core includes icon component

date-libraries.comment: Date picker has built-in date handling; no external date library required

aria-compliant.comment: Components follow WAI-ARIA patterns; ARIA attributes applied where appropriate (aria-expanded, etc.)

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard support for interactive components; Datagrid has dedicated keyboard shortcuts

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader tested; Deque evaluated Clarity against WCAG 2.1/2.2; ongoing screen reader accessibility work documented

focus-management.comment: Focus management actively addressed; fixes for focus lost to body and inappropriate focus movement; modals handle focus properly

wcag-level.comment: VPAT available evaluating WCAG 2.1/2.2; Deque-evaluated against WCAG 2.1, 2.2, EN 301 549, and US Section 508

accessibility-rating.comment: Good accessibility with explicit commitment; ARIA compliant, keyboard navigation, screen reader tested by Deque, WCAG AA; some components like Color Picker have known keyboard/screen reader gaps

bundle-size-full.comment: Unpacked size 12.1 MB; tree-shakeable so full bundle varies by usage; bundlephobia data not fully available

bundle-size-core.comment: Import components individually via @clr/angular; @clr/ui provides CSS separately

tree-shakeable.comment: Components imported individually; unused components excluded from bundle via Angular module system

zero-runtime.comment: Components require runtime JavaScript; not a zero-runtime solution

lazy-loading.comment: Angular lazy loading supported; component modules can be lazy-loaded via Angular's routing system

documentation-quality.comment: Adequate documentation with component API reference and examples; some navigation/discoverability issues; v17 transition introduced gaps

storybook.comment: Official Storybook available for Clarity Core components

figma-kit.comment: Official Figma libraries for themes, icons, colors available via free Figma account; third-party Clarity UI Kit also available with enhanced accuracy

cli-generator.comment: ng add @clr/angular for installation; Angular CLI schematics for setup

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~23,653 weekly downloads for @clr/angular as of December 2025; 60 dependent projects

commercial-support.comment: No official commercial support tier; maintained by VMware/Broadcom; enterprise users typically have VMware support contracts

style-override.comment: Override via CSS classes and CSS custom properties (design tokens); SCSS variables for build-time customization

compound-components.comment: Pattern used in components like Modal (header, content, footer), Accordion, Tabs

render-props.comment: Angular uses template references instead of render props pattern

slots.comment: Content projection via ng-content and template outlets throughout components

unstyled-mode.comment: No unstyled/headless mode; components ship with Clarity Design System styles
